case_title: IANTORNO, SERGIO vs. AREVALO, TITO et al

docket_entries.description: DEPT 1/JUDGE MASON: PER PLTF, CASE SETTLED AS TO DEFT TITO AREVALO. JURY TRIAL DATE STANDS AS TO DEFT ANGELICA AREVALO. PROBABLE SETTLEMENT AS TO THIS DEFT BEFORE TRIAL DATE, BUT TRIAL DATE RESERVED AT REQUEST OF PLTF.
OFF JURY CALENDAR A/C FAILURE TO DEPOSIT JURY FEES WITHIN PRESCRIBED TIME AS SET FORTH IN SEC. 631 CCP RESET FOR COURT TRIAL ON OCT-01-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF IANTORNO, SERGIO SERVED AUG-27-1996, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AREVALO, TITO

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AREVALO, TITO AREVALO, ANGELICA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 119 FAIR OAKS, SAN FRANCISCO; ALSO GARAGE & STORAGE AREAS $5,000.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,000.00, STAYED UNTIL NOV-24-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, EXECUTION ON MONEY JUDGMNT STAYED TO 9-24-97. DEFTS WAIVE RIGHT TO RETURN OF SEC DEPOSIT. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN FEES & COSTS. NO FURTHER STAYS.
